name: POS Register Management
body:
[{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Registers in Retail Express"}], "data-id": "registers-in-retail-express"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "What are Registers used for?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
Registers are used to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manage cash floats"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Track which till a sale was processed at"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Identify and reconcile cash variances"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Control hardware configurations for printing receipts and EFTPOS terminals."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Best Practice Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
We recommend setting up a "}, {"text": "separate Register for each till", "bold": true}, {"text": " in your store. This makes cash management easier and allows for more flexibility with in-store hardware such as PCs, EFTPOS terminals, and printers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default Back Office Register", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
Each Outlet in Retail Express automatically includes a "}, {"text": "Back Office Register", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This is used for non-register processes such as:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Online sales"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Adjustments from bookkeepers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Other non-POS activity"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional Registers", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Extra registers can be created to separate income reporting and use independent cash-up/end-of-day routines."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Each Outlet receives "}, {"text": "one complimentary Back Office Register", "bold": true}, {"text": " plus "}, {"text": "one additional included register", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To add, enable, disable, or remove registers, please contact "}, {"text": "Customer Success", "bold": true}, {"text": " at:  "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:success@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "success@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": "(Additional fees may apply.)", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Editing Register Details", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
To edit core details of your Registers:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Registers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "pencil/edit icon", "bold": true}, {"text": " beside the register you want to update"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can rename registers and select Quick Product Profiles"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Important Notes", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Registers "}, {"text": "cannot be deleted", "bold": true}, {"text": " once they have associated sales or cash-ups."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At least "}, {"text": "one active Register per location", "bold": true}, {"text": " is required at all times."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Hide Registers", "bold": true}], "data-id": "hide-registers"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Users have greater control over their Point of Sale (POS) experience by being able to disable back-office registers as an option to select, resulting in a more focused and streamlined POS login screen."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To disable Registers:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to: "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Registers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A column with a "}, {"text": "POS Enabled", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox has been added"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the Pencil Icon to unlock 'Edit' section"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can select or de-select to make the back office Registers enabled or disabled"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230926at30551AM.05T5g00000w5vyfEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230926at30551AM.05T5g00000w5vyfEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 800, "height": 487}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You must have at least one register enabled per outlet. success@maropost .com.au"}]}], "appearance": "info"}]
